scripts.build: react-scripts build && javascript-obfuscator ./build/static/js --output ./build/static/js --compact true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --debug-protection true && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const htmlPath = './build/index.html'; let html = fs.readFileSync(htmlPath, 'utf8'); const oldJsPath = './build/static/js'; const oldCssPath = './build/static/css'; const newModulePath = './build/module'; const newJsPath = './build/module/js'; const newCssPath = './build/module/css'; if (!fs.existsSync(newModulePath)) fs.mkdirSync(newModulePath); if (!fs.existsSync(newJsPath)) fs.mkdirSync(newJsPath); if (!fs.existsSync(newCssPath)) fs.mkdirSync(newCssPath); const jsFile = fs.readdirSync(oldJsPath).find(f => f.startsWith('main.') && f.endsWith('.js')); if(jsFile) { fs.renameSync(oldJsPath + '/' + jsFile, newJsPath + '/eltrihidee.js'); html = html.replace('defer="defer" src="/static/js/' + jsFile + '"', 'root="root" src="/module/js/eltrihidee.js"'); } const cssFile = fs.readdirSync(oldCssPath).find(f => f.startsWith('main.') && f.endsWith('.css')); if(cssFile) { fs.renameSync(oldCssPath + '/' + cssFile, newCssPath + '/eltriKatolik.css'); html = html.replace('href="/static/css/' + cssFile + '"', 'href="/module/css/eltriKatolik.css"'); } fs.writeFileSync(htmlPath, html, 'utf8'); fs.rmSync('./build/static', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('✅ FINAL SETUP SUCCESS: Script root="root" & CSS href="/module/..." active!');"
